attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
REV.RPO_FLG                       ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH     ,
REV.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
REV.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
--REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
REV.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
REV.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
REV.CORP_FLG                      ,
REV.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
REV.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
REV.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
REV.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
REV.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
REV.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
REV.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
REV.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
REV.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
REV.PROCESS_DT                    ,
REV.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
REV.HOLD_FLG                      ,
REV.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
REV.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
REV.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
REV.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
REV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
REV.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
REV.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
REV.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
REV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
REV.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
REV.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
REV.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
REV.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
REV.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
REV.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
REV.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
REV.ATO_NAME                      ,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
REV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
REV.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
REV.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
REV.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT *COALESCE(REV.REM_ALLOC_PCT,1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.DV_ACTIVE_FLG                 ,
REV.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
REV.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
REV.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
REV.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
REV.DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT           ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT            ,
REV.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT    ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
BKGS.DV_GOODS_ADJ_PRD_KEY    ,      
BKGS.BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,   
BKGS.BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,  
BKGS.BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME     , 
BKGS.DV_CX_PRODUCT  
,REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT as  ORDER_ALLOC_PCT
,BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
,1 PP_PID_PCT
,'PID_ALLOCATION_POS' RECORD_TYPE
,REV.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SBP_SOL_REV REV

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SBP_SOL_BKGS_PAP  BKGS
ON REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY

WHERE   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_AS_BY_PID_SBP SBP 
WHERE SBP.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

SELECT
REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
REV.RPO_FLG                       ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,

REV.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
REV.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
REV.PROCESS_DT                    ,
REV.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
REV.HOLD_FLG                      ,
REV.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
REV.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
REV.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
REV.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
REV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
REV.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
REV.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
REV.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
REV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
REV.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
REV.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
REV.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
REV.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
REV.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
REV.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
REV.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
REV.ATO_NAME                      ,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
REV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
REV.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
REV.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
REV.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT *COALESCE(REV.REM_ALLOC_PCT,1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.DV_ACTIVE_FLG                 ,
REV.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
REV.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
REV.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
REV.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
REV.DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT           ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT            ,
REV.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT    ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
BKGS.DV_GOODS_ADJ_PRD_KEY    ,      
BKGS.BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,   
BKGS.BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,  
BKGS.BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME     , 
BKGS.DV_CX_PRODUCT  
,REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT as  ORDER_ALLOC_PCT
,BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
,1 PP_PID_PCT
,'PID_ALLOCATION_POS' RECORD_TYPE
,REV.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SBP_SOL_REV REV

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SBP_SOL_BKGS_PAP  BKGS
ON REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY

WHERE   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_AS_BY_PID_SBP SBP 
WHERE SBP.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

SELECT
REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
REV.RPO_FLG                       ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH     ,
REV.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
REV.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
--REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
REV.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
REV.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
REV.CORP_FLG                      ,
REV.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
REV.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
REV.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
REV.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
REV.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
REV.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
REV.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
REV.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
REV.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
REV.PROCESS_DT                    ,
REV.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
REV.HOLD_FLG                      ,
REV.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
REV.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
REV.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
REV.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
REV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
REV.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
REV.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
REV.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
REV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
REV.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
REV.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
REV.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
REV.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
REV.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
REV.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
REV.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
REV.ATO_NAME                      ,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
REV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
REV.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
REV.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
REV.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT *COALESCE(REV.REM_ALLOC_PCT,1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.DV_ACTIVE_FLG                 ,
REV.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
REV.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
REV.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
REV.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
REV.DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT           ,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,
CAST((REV.TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT *COALESCE(TRIM(REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT),1)*COALESCE(TRIM(BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT),1)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT            ,
REV.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT    ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
BKGS.DV_GOODS_ADJ_PRD_KEY    ,      
BKGS.BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,   
BKGS.BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,  
BKGS.BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME     , 
BKGS.DV_CX_PRODUCT  
,REV.REV_ALLOC_PCT as  ORDER_ALLOC_PCT
,BKGS.BKGS_ALLOC_PCT QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
,1 PP_PID_PCT
,'PID_ALLOCATION_POS' RECORD_TYPE
,REV.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SBP_SOL_REV REV

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SBP_SOL_BKGS_PAP  BKGS
ON REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY

WHERE   NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_AS_BY_PID_SBP SBP 
WHERE SBP.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT /NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT AS TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,TOTAL.TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT, TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT 
,COALESCE(DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT /NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ),1) REM_ALLOC_PCT,
TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP_SBP WHERE UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT>0  
AND PRODUCT_KEY > 0) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT)  TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,SUM(UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  )  AS   TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT 
  ,SUM( DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_ORDER_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP_SBP
WHERE UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT>0 AND PRODUCT_KEY >0 
 GROUP BY 1) TOTAL
ON NET.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=TOTAL.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY

SELECT  NET.*,COALESCE(CAST(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,10))/NULLIFZERO(CAST(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,10))),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM  
(SEL PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_GOODS_ADJ_PRD_KEY    ,      
BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,   
BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,  
BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME     , 
DV_CX_PRODUCT                 
,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_BKGS_POS_SBP  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) NET
INNER JOIN
(SELECT PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_BKGS_POS_SBP 
 GROUP BY 1) TOTAL
ON NET.PRODUCT_KEY=TOTAL.PRODUCT_KEY

SELECT  NET.*,COALESCE(CAST(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,10))/NULLIFZERO(CAST(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,10))),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM  
(SEL PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_GOODS_ADJ_PRD_KEY    ,      
BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,   
BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,  
BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME     , 
DV_CX_PRODUCT                 
,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_BKGS_POS_SBP  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) NET
INNER JOIN
(SELECT PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_BKGS_POS_SBP 
 GROUP BY 1) TOTAL
ON NET.PRODUCT_KEY=TOTAL.PRODUCT_KEY

SELECT  NET.*,COALESCE(CAST(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,10))/NULLIFZERO(CAST(TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,10))),1) BKGS_ALLOC_PCT FROM  
(SEL PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_GOODS_ADJ_PRD_KEY    ,      
BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,   
BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME ,  
BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME     , 
DV_CX_PRODUCT                 
,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_BKGS_NEG_SBP  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) NET
INNER JOIN
(SELECT PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)  TOTAL_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_BKGS_NEG_SBP 
 GROUP BY 1) TOTAL
ON NET.PRODUCT_KEY=TOTAL.PRODUCT_KEY

SEL WI.*
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_REVENUE_SBP_FINAL WI
 WHERE /*WI.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT NOT BETWEEN -20 AND  20
AND*/ WI.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' 
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH 
 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SBP','NET_ADJ_SBP','SBP_ACCRUALS','OPL','OPL_ACCRUALS') GROUP BY 1)
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH = WI.FISCAL_MTH                    
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_AS_BY_PID_SBP  WRDEF
WHERE WRDEF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT /NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT AS TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,TOTAL.TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT, TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT 
,COALESCE(DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT /NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ),1) REM_ALLOC_PCT,
TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP_SBP WHERE UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT<0  
AND PRODUCT_KEY > 0) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT)  TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,SUM(UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  )  AS   TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT 
  ,SUM( DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_ORDER_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP_SBP
WHERE UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT<0 AND PRODUCT_KEY >0 
 GROUP BY 1) TOTAL
ON NET.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=TOTAL.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY

SELECT NET.*,COALESCE(DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT /NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT ),1) REV_ALLOC_PCT ,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT AS TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,TOTAL.TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT, TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT 
,COALESCE(DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT /NULLIFZERO(TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT ),1) REM_ALLOC_PCT,
TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,TOTAL.TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
FROM 
(SELECT *FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP_SBP WHERE DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT>0 
AND PRODUCT_KEY > 0) NET
INNER JOIN
(SEL ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT)  TOTAL_TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,SUM(UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  )  AS   TOTAL_TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT 
  ,SUM( DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  ) AS TOTAL_DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM(DV_ORDER_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_DV_ORDER_QUANTITY
,SUM(DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP_SBP
WHERE DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT>0 AND PRODUCT_KEY >0 
 GROUP BY 1) TOTAL
ON NET.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY=TOTAL.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY

SEL WI.*
FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_REVENUE_SBP_FINAL WI
 WHERE /*WI.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT NOT BETWEEN -20 AND  20
AND*/ WI.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' 
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH 
 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SBP','NET_ADJ_SBP','SBP_ACCRUALS','OPL','OPL_ACCRUALS') GROUP BY 1)
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH <> WI.FISCAL_MTH                    
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_AS_BY_PID_SBP  WRDEF
WHERE WRDEF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_UNBD_REVENUE_SBP_FINAL WI
 WHERE /*WI.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT NOT BETWEEN -20 AND  20
AND*/ WI.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' 
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_AS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH 
 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SBP','NET_ADJ_SBP','SBP_ACCRUALS','OPL','OPL_ACCRUALS') GROUP BY 1)
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH <> WI.FISCAL_MTH                    
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_AS_BY_PID_SBP  WRDEF
WHERE WRDEF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )
